reforms.description: Estonia has developed a smart specialisation strategy that combines industrial, educational, and innovation policies, aiming to enhance innovation-driven growth through a collaborative approach involving all stakeholders.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to improve the effectiveness of public innovation support, which can lead to increased productivity and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: Important steps have been recently taken to improve the effectiveness of public innovation support.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in how Estonia approaches innovation policy, integrating various sectors and stakeholders to drive growth.
reforms.source_quote: Estonia has developed a smart specialisation strategy which can be a useful policy framework for innovation-driven growth.

reforms.description: The Estonian government has clarified responsibilities for R&D policies and strengthened coordination across ministries to enhance the effectiveness of innovation policies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improved coordination can lead to more effective implementation of innovation policies, fostering a better environment for R&D activities.
reforms.status_evidence: Responsibilities for R&D policies have been clarified and coordination across ministries has been strengthened.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it enhances the governance of R&D policies, which is crucial for effective innovation management.
reforms.source_quote: Responsibilities for R&D policies have been clarified and coordination across ministries has been strengthened.

reforms.description: To strengthen knowledge transfers to domestic firms, Estonia plans to promote applied research and improve collaboration with domestic and foreign institutions conducting applied research.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing knowledge transfer is expected to boost innovation and productivity in domestic firms, leading to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Plans to promote applied research and improve collaboration have been outlined.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses a significant gap in collaboration between firms and research institutions, which is crucial for enhancing innovation capacity.
reforms.source_quote: To strengthen knowledge transfers to domestic firms, promote applied research and improve collaboration with domestic and foreign institutions conducting applied research.

reforms.description: Estonia's smart specialisation strategy aims to enhance the impact of research, development, and innovation on economic growth by identifying priority areas for knowledge-based investments, such as ICT, healthcare, and resource efficiency.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By focusing on sectors with high growth potential, the strategy is expected to drive productivity and innovation, ultimately contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy is part of Estonia's ongoing efforts to improve its R&D and innovation landscape.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy represents a significant shift in Estonia's approach to innovation policy, focusing on targeted investments that align with the country's strengths and growth potential.
reforms.source_quote: Estonia has developed its own smart specialisation strategy... The new strategy aims at enhancing the impact of research, development and innovation on economic growth.

reforms.description: The Estonian government is enhancing collaboration between public and private sectors to improve innovation outcomes, including the establishment of a Steering Committee to facilitate inter-ministerial cooperation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improved collaboration is expected to identify and address barriers to innovation, leading to enhanced productivity and economic performance.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has set up a Steering Committee to enhance collaboration on innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to improve the governance of innovation policy, although it is still in the early stages of implementation.
reforms.source_quote: Accordingly, Estonia set up a Steering Committee, which includes representatives from different ministries, industry and academia.

reforms.description: Estonia's e-residence initiative aims to enhance the country's international profile by allowing individuals worldwide to register companies and manage business operations remotely in Estonia.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitates international business operations, potentially attracting foreign investment and fostering entrepreneurship.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been launched and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant step in enhancing Estonia's attractiveness for international entrepreneurs, contributing to the growth of the startup ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: E-residence facilitates persons across the world to do business with and in Estonia.

reforms.description: Estonia plans to enhance the effectiveness of innovation policies by ensuring inter-ministerial working groups are held accountable and their performance is regularly reviewed.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving accountability and performance review of innovation policies is expected to lead to more effective policy outcomes, fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has proposed measures to enhance the effectiveness of innovation policies.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to improve the governance and effectiveness of innovation policies, which is essential for fostering a robust innovation ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: To raise the effectiveness of innovation policies, ensure inter-ministerial working groups are held accountable and their performance is regularly reviewed.

reforms.description: The Estonian Government launched an action plan to reduce the gender pay gap, which includes steps to improve gender equality legislation and encourage gender mainstreaming in various sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving gender equality in the labor market can enhance labor utilization and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The action plan includes specific steps to improve gender equality.
reforms.importance_rationale: The action plan represents a significant effort to address gender disparities in the labor market, which can have lasting effects on economic performance.
reforms.source_quote: The Estonian Government launched an action plan 2012-15 to reduce the gender pay gap.

reforms.description: The Estonian government has introduced a life-long learning strategy for 2014-2020 aimed at improving labor market outcomes and educational policy decisions. This strategy includes measures to enhance vocational education and training, as well as to forecast and monitor labor market needs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to vocational education and aligning it with labor market needs, the strategy aims to enhance employability and productivity, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy is being implemented with specific programs being elaborated by the Ministry of Education and Research.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy represents a significant systemic change in how Estonia approaches education and labor market alignment, with long-term implications for human capital development.
reforms.source_quote: The Strategy aims at meeting labour market needs better, as well as at meeting well-being objectives.

reforms.description: The Estonian government has taken steps to improve vocational education by upgrading technical equipment in vocational schools and allowing practitioners from businesses to teach. This aims to enhance the quality and relevance of vocational training.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing vocational education, the initiative aims to improve the skills of the workforce, which can lead to higher productivity and better employment outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has supported upgrading the technical equipment of vocational schools.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant improvement in vocational education, which is crucial for aligning skills with labor market needs.
reforms.source_quote: The government has taken substantial steps to improve vocational education in recent years.

reforms.description: The Estonian government implemented an improved needs-based study grant system in 2013, which varies based on students' family income and academic performance, aiming to widen access to tertiary education for disadvantaged students.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing access to higher education for disadvantaged groups, the reform enhances the overall skill level of the workforce, which can lead to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The needs-based study grant system was put into effect in 2013.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly improves financial support for students, particularly those from low-income backgrounds, thereby addressing educational inequalities and enhancing human capital development.
reforms.source_quote: It is therefore welcome that an improved needs-based study grant system was implemented in 2013.

reforms.description: Grants for vocational students were introduced to support the acquisition of vocational education and training abroad, aimed at improving qualifications and facilitating technology transfer.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing vocational training and qualifications, the reform aims to improve the employability of students and meet labor market needs, thus supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Grants for vocational students were introduced to support their education and training.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it enhances vocational education opportunities, which are crucial for aligning skills with labor market demands.
reforms.source_quote: Grants for vocational students could also support the acquisition of vocational education and training abroad.
